name: style
label: Style

children.name: spacing_alignment
children.label: Spacing & alignment
children.inline_help_text: Settings for customising the modules padding, vertical alignment and maximum width.

children.name: padding_top
children.label: Top padding
children.inline_help_text: Space above the module content (in pixels).

children.name: padding_bottom
children.label: Bottom padding
children.inline_help_text: Space below the module content (in pixels).

children.name: padding_top
children.label: Top padding
children.inline_help_text: Space above the module content (in pixels).

children.name: padding_bottom
children.label: Bottom padding
children.inline_help_text: Space below the module content (in pixels).

inline_help_text: Customise the visual appearance and layout of this module.

name: enable_module_heading
label: Enable Module Heading
inline_help_text: Enables/disables the ability to add a heading, summary text, and a CTA or link above the module.

name: module_heading
label: Section header

children.name: heading
children.label: Headline
children.inline_help_text: Main heading for this section. Keep concise for best readability.

children.name: heading_type
children.label: Heading level
children.inline_help_text: Determines the size of the heading text with H1 being the largest and H6 being the smallest.

children.name: summary
children.label: Summary text
children.inline_help_text: Optional supporting text that appears below the headline.

children.name: add_link_cta_
children.label: Add Link/CTA?
children.inline_help_text: Enables/disables the ability to add a CTA or link to follow the heading or heading text if populated.

children.name: button
children.label: Link / CTA
children.inline_help_text: Settings for populating and customising a link or CTA element.

children.name: button_type
children.label: Button type
children.inline_help_text: Choose "Link" for standard buttons or "CTA" to use a HubSpot CTA.

children.name: button_style
children.label: Button style
children.inline_help_text: Primary: main action. Secondary: alternative action. Tertiary: subtle link style.

children.name: link_field
children.label: Button destination
children.inline_help_text: Where the button links to. Can be a page, external URL, file, or email.

children.name: link_text
children.label: Button text
children.inline_help_text: Text displayed on the button. Keep short and action-oriented.

children.name: cta_field
children.label: Select CTA
children.inline_help_text: Select a CTA created in Marketing > Lead Capture > CTAs.

children.name: position
children.label: Position
children.inline_help_text: Settings for vertical spacing values for creating space above and below the module heading.

inline_help_text: Optional section header with headline, description, and call-to-action.

children.name: features
children.label: Features
children.inline_help_text: Add, remove, or reorder features. Recommended: 3-6 for best layout.

children.name: product_link
children.label: Product link

name: scrollid
label: Anchor ID
inline_help_text: Optional anchor ID for in-page navigation links (e.g., "features" creates #features).
